purpose: Tie one recipient non-init command-message rejection transition to its claim, proof certificate, schematic trace, rendered SVG, and source-status boundaries.
boundaries: This bundle covers the non-init recipient command-message rejection boundary.
It preserves the init-family recipient command-message transition as separate from the standard-signal recipient command-message rejection and multi-command conflict policy.
Recipient write-buffer command-message execution moved to ADR-0169 append behavior and is no longer rejected at this boundary.
